feedItems.description: allocated £18.6m to Environment & Streets (≈£76 per resident)
allocated £68.3m to Children's Social Care (≈£280 per resident)
allocated £95.9m to Adult Social Care (≈£393 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £120 (5.5%) to £2318
